name: Tyson Properties

Compliance.description: Active national agency with multiple branches; no explicit PPC/PPRA registration numbers found on site but operating legally as per listings and news; no complaints or violations noted in searches.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Very low HelloPeter rating of 1.67/5 from 6 recent 2025 reviews (5x 1-star, 1x 5-star), dominated by letting complaints; employee reviews positive but customer-focused data poor.

Product Value.description: Broad rental range with transparency on site listings, but reviews cite hidden costs and poor condition reducing value.

Innovation.description: Mentions industry-leading technology, website with listings/show houses alerts, no dedicated app or advanced digital letting features found.

Customer Support.description: Reviews highlight unresponsive support, rude staff, ignored maintenance requests, poor complaint resolution in lettings.

Accessibility & Security.description: Standard website access, industry-leading tech mentioned but no specific POPIA/security details or app; basic digital inclusivity.

keyFeatures: rentals from studios to luxury homes

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Rentals from R6,500/mo (1-bed apt) to R45,000/mo (luxury); deposit equals rent + admin ~R1,150

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter strongly negative on lettings (filthy properties, no support); no recent positive customer data; employee reviews 4.2/5 Indeed.
